---
title: "Agentic MRE Reporting Pipeline"
description: "An agentic LLM pipeline that structures free-text MR enterography reports into auditable data."
date: 2026-06-08
categories: [tooling, LLM, agentic, MRE, NLP]
draft: true
---

::: {.project-card}
[Active]{.project-status .active}

## What it does

Placeholder. To be filled in later.

:::
